title: Build MusicScope music streaming app with mood-based recommendations

requirements.text: Create backend data model for Song with fields: id (Text), title (Text), artist (Text), album (Text), mood (Text), genre (Text), audioUrl (Text), duration (Nat), and createdAt (Int)

quotes: Create backend data models for songs (with mood, genre, audio URL)

acceptanceCriteria: Song type defined in backend with all specified fields
Fields include mood and genre for recommendation algorithm
Audio URL field stores the location of the song file

requirements.text: Create backend data model for UserProfile with fields: userId (Principal), displayName (Text), contact (Text), likedSongs (Array of song IDs), downloadedSongs (Array of song IDs), and createdAt (Int)

quotes: user profiles (with liked/downloaded songs)
the users ID contact and the like the songs and downloaded songs has to shown

acceptanceCriteria: UserProfile type defined with userId as Principal
Arrays store liked and downloaded song IDs
Contact information field included

requirements.text: Create backend data model for ListeningHistory with fields: id (Text), userId (Principal), songId (Text), timestamp (Int), and mood (Text)

quotes: listening history
shows the songs listened per day or week or month or year

acceptanceCriteria: ListeningHistory type captures each play event
Timestamp field enables time-based aggregation
Mood captured for tracking preference patterns

requirements.text: Implement backend method to add songs with all fields (title, artist, album, mood, genre, audioUrl, duration) and return the created song

quotes: Implement backend methods for song management

acceptanceCriteria: Method accepts song parameters and stores in stable storage
Generated unique ID returned with created song
All fields properly validated before storage

requirements.text: Implement backend method to retrieve all songs as an array

quotes: song management
first page is home page where the songs are listed

acceptanceCriteria: Method returns complete list of all songs
Array includes all song fields
Empty array returned if no songs exist

requirements.text: Implement backend method to get songs filtered by artist, returning an array grouped by artist name

quotes: second page has artist and albums which has to show

acceptanceCriteria: Method filters songs by artist parameter
Returns array of songs for specified artist
Supports case-insensitive matching

requirements.text: Implement backend method to get songs filtered by album, returning an array grouped by album name

quotes: second page has artist and albums which has to show

acceptanceCriteria: Method filters songs by album parameter
Returns array of songs for specified album
Supports case-insensitive matching

requirements.text: Implement backend method to search songs by query string, matching against title, artist, album, or genre, returning filtered results

quotes: Third pages search page where the songs typed in the search bar has to shown

acceptanceCriteria: Method performs case-insensitive search across multiple fields
Returns songs matching any of: title, artist, album, genre
Empty query returns all songs

requirements.text: Implement backend method to create or update user profile with displayName, contact, and return the profile

quotes: user profile operations
the users ID contact

acceptanceCriteria: Method creates profile if not exists, updates if exists
Uses caller Principal as userId
Returns updated profile with all fields

requirements.text: Implement backend method to get user profile by Principal, returning profile with liked/downloaded song counts

quotes: Profile (user stats)
like the songs and downloaded songs has to shown with number of accounts

acceptanceCriteria: Method retrieves profile for specified Principal
Returns null or error if profile does not exist
Includes counts of liked and downloaded songs

requirements.text: Implement backend method to add a song to user's liked songs array and persist the change

quotes: liked songs

acceptanceCriteria: Method adds songId to likedSongs array
Prevents duplicate entries
Returns success confirmation

requirements.text: Implement backend method to remove a song from user's liked songs array

quotes: liked songs

acceptanceCriteria: Method removes songId from likedSongs array
Handles case where song was not liked
Returns success confirmation

requirements.text: Implement backend method to add a song to user's downloaded songs array and persist the change

quotes: downloaded songs

acceptanceCriteria: Method adds songId to downloadedSongs array
Prevents duplicate entries
Returns success confirmation

requirements.text: Implement backend method to record listening history entry with userId, songId, timestamp, and mood

quotes: listening history tracking

acceptanceCriteria: Method creates new history entry with current timestamp
Captures song mood for recommendation algorithm
Persists to stable storage

requirements.text: Implement backend method to get listening history for a user, filterable by time period (day, week, month, year), returning an array of history entries with song details

quotes: shows the songs listened per day or week or month or year

acceptanceCriteria: Method accepts userId and time period filter
Returns history entries within specified time range
Includes song details joined with history records

requirements.text: Implement backend mood-based recommendation algorithm that takes current song mood and returns an array of 5-10 songs with matching or complementary moods, excluding recently played songs

quotes: mood-based recommendation algorithm
the current song mood made to predict next song on the same mood

acceptanceCriteria: Algorithm filters songs by matching mood
Returns 5-10 recommended songs
Excludes songs played in current session
Randomizes results to provide variety

requirements.text: Create Home page at route '/' that displays all songs in a scrollable list with song title, artist, album, and duration, and triggers playback when a song is clicked

quotes: first page is home page where the songs are listed and while touching songs has to play

acceptanceCriteria: Home page fetches and displays all songs
Each song card shows title, artist, album, duration
Clicking a song triggers playback in persistent player
List is scrollable with smooth scrolling behavior

requirements.text: Create Artists/Albums page at route '/artists' that groups songs by artist and album with expandable sections, displaying album art or placeholder, and triggers playback when a song is clicked

quotes: second page has artist and albums which has to show and while touching the song that song has to play

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays artists with their albums in grouped sections
Sections are expandable/collapsible
Songs within each album clickable for playback
Shows placeholder art when album art unavailable

requirements.text: Create Search page at route '/search' with a search input that filters songs in real-time as user types, displaying matching results, and triggers playback when a result is clicked

quotes: Third pages search page where the songs typed in the search bar has to shown and while touching that song the song has to play

acceptanceCriteria: Search input filters songs client-side or server-side
Results update in real-time as user types
Clicking a result triggers playback
Shows 'no results' message when search yields nothing

requirements.text: Create Dashboard page at route '/dashboard' that displays listening history visualization with colorful bar and line charts, filterable by day, week, month, and year time periods

quotes: Dashboard (visualization with colorful charts)
shows the songs listened per day or week or month or year
add different type of charts with the colourful bars and lines

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows at least 2 chart types (bar and line)
Charts display listening history data with colorful styling
Time period filter buttons (day/week/month/year) update charts
Charts are responsive and animated

requirements.text: Create Profile page at route '/profile' that displays user ID, contact information, count of liked songs, count of downloaded songs, and lists of liked/downloaded songs with playback functionality

quotes: Profile page displaying user ID, contact, liked songs, downloaded songs with counts
the users ID contact and the like the songs and downloaded songs has to shown with number of accounts

acceptanceCriteria: Profile displays user Principal ID and contact
Shows total counts for liked and downloaded songs
Lists liked songs with ability to play or remove
Lists downloaded songs with ability to play
Allows editing contact information

requirements.text: Implement a persistent music player component that remains visible and functional across all pages, displays current song info (title, artist, album art), includes play/pause, previous/next controls, progress bar, and volume control

quotes: Persistent music player component with cross-page playback

acceptanceCriteria: Player component persists when navigating between pages
Displays currently playing song title, artist, album art
Play/pause, previous, next buttons functional
Progress bar shows playback position and allows seeking
Volume control adjusts playback volume

requirements.text: Implement auto-queue functionality in music player that fetches mood-based recommendations when current song ends and automatically plays the next recommended song

quotes: mood-based auto-queue
the current song mood made to predict next song on the same mood

acceptanceCriteria: When song finishes, player fetches recommendations based on current song mood
Next song automatically starts playing
Queue shows upcoming recommended songs
User can skip to next recommendation or manually select different song

requirements.text: Design an interactive, vibrant UI with a distinct visual theme featuring smooth animations, hover effects on clickable elements, gradient accents, and colorful components throughout all pages

quotes: Make the app more interactive and attractive
Interactive UI with smooth animations, hover effects, and gradient accents

acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements have hover effects
Page transitions and component animations are smooth
Gradient accents used in headers, buttons, or backgrounds
Color palette is vibrant and cohesive across all pages
Typography and spacing create visual hierarchy

constraints: All backend logic must be implemented in a single Motoko actor
Frontend must use React with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Query
Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Audio playback must use HTML5 audio APIs, not external streaming services
User authentication handled through Internet Identity only
nonGoals: Integration with Spotify, Apple Music, or other third-party streaming APIs
Real-time collaborative playlists or social features

required: Abstract music-themed hero background with vibrant gradients and sound wave patterns (hero-music-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Default album art placeholder with musical notes and colorful geometric shapes (album-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
Music note icon for empty states and loading (music-note-icon.dim_128x128.png)
